title: PayRespectV2
description: a spigot plugin that announces to the server when you die, plus some goodies
body:
# PayRespectV2

This is the same plugin but updated to the latest version with an extra command I thought would be fitting, 

## DISCLAIMER

While the current versions say it is only for the recent versions it will work up to 1.8


## What does this plugin do?


Quite simply, it sends a console message whenever a player has the misfortune of dying. 


## What is new?


Other than being updated to the latest version, I have added some other commands that relate to death


## Commands:


Test: makes sure the plugin is working properly

Freedom: kills the player who issued the command

FiringSquad: kills everyone with a countdown

DeathCount: shows the player how many times they have died

DeathLeaderboard: gives the top ten deaths in the server

payrespect version: checks for any updates
